description: A6 authenticity (the external trust root): the reference loads from a file AND ships an ed25519 detached signature verified against the profile's trust_anchor public key. A valid signature means the golden data was attested by a key-holder OUTSIDE the AI authorship loop — independence the gate otherwise lacks. Harness output 2*x matches the authenticated reference => GO. A tampered reference or wrong key would BLOCK (selftest covers both).
